commands.name: watch

options.name: --auto-extract
options.description:
Whether to automatically try to extract the content of the
new .ZIP file.

options.name: --auto-extract-directory
options.description:
Directory to watch for new .ZIP files; otherwise, attempts
to watch directories defined by the 'DIRECTORY_WATCHER_DIRECTORIES' environment
variable.

options.name: --overwrite-files
options.description:
Whether to automatically overwrite files in the destination
directory if any conflicts occur.

arguments.name: watch-directory
arguments.description:
Directory to watch for new .ZIP files. Attempts to watch 
directories defined by the 'DIRECTORY_WATCHER_DIRECTORIES' environment variable 
if unspecified.

commands.description:
Starts watching a directory (or directories specified by the 
'DIRECTORY_WATCHER_DIRECTORIES' environment variable) for new .ZIP 
files.
